actions.action: Independently review scripts/doctor.sh's co-introduced test, then split the 803-line accretion-only script into sourced modules
actions.first_step: Open scripts/doctor.sh (803 LOC, at the 800 watch line, accretion-only); confirm its test was written against intended behaviour, not the script's own output
actions.done_when: A human has signed off the test as independent; doctor.sh is split so no single file exceeds the 800-line ratchet; go test ./tests/architecture -run Size stays green
actions.scope_fence: Only scripts/doctor.sh + its test + any extracted scripts/doctor.d/*.sh; no behaviour change to the health checks themselves

actions.action: Split api/jsonschema/manifest.v1.schema.json (1593 LOC, accretion-only) into $ref-linked sub-schemas
actions.first_step: Extract repeated definition blocks into $defs / referenced files and re-point with $ref
actions.done_when: The schema validates identically (manifest validation tests pass) and no single schema file exceeds ~800 LOC
actions.scope_fence: Only the schema files + $ref wiring; do not change any validation semantics or accepted manifest shapes

actions.action: Delete the obsolete bare t.Skip markers that cap L5, and action the stale TODO markers in cmd/meridian/main.go
actions.first_step: Remove repository_test.go:381/420 skips (database constraints now prevent corrupted currency data, survived 22 edits); fix-or-delete grpc_service_test.go:2438 (known-flaky idempotency, survived 17); ticket-or-delete the cmd/meridian/main.go markers
actions.done_when: No bare (unlinked) skip survives in the named files; go test ./... green
actions.scope_fence: Only delete skips whose guarded scenario is genuinely obsolete or whose flake is fixed; keep legitimate short-mode / Kafka-availability conditional skips
